title: Hollow Knight Nail Swords
description: A resource pack that changes your sword to look like the nail from Hollow Knight when you rename it to "Nail".
body:
A resource pack that changes swords into the Hollow Knight nails. To get your sword to become a nail, rename it to "Nail". The different tiers of nail are obtainable with different levels of sharpness, with each level of sharpness tiering your nail up by one place. Old Nail is the base nail and Pure Nail takes up both sharpness 4 and 5.

My other Hollow Knight related packs:
- [Macebug Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/macebug-mace)
- [Silksong Needle Spears](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/silksong-needle-spears)
